rationale: For Romania, the Iran deal timing dispute keeps energy price outlook uncertain, while Ukraine's strikes on Russian energy infrastructure are a nearby geopolitical signal.

top_events.title: Trump says US-Iran deal to be signed Sunday; Tehran casts doubt on timing
top_events.summary: Uncertainty over the Iran deal's timing keeps energy price volatility elevated for Romania, which is sensitive to EU-wide gas and oil costs.

top_events.title: Ukraine to keep targeting Russian energy after hitting sea terminal
top_events.summary: Ukrainian strikes on Russian energy infrastructure near the Black Sea region are directly relevant to Romania's security environment and regional energy flows.

top_events.title: Hungary's former PM Orban re-elected party leader despite election loss
top_events.summary: Orban's continued leadership of Fidesz keeps a pro-Russia, EU-skeptic voice active on Romania's western border, with implications for regional NATO and EU cohesion.
